summary: Seeded latent-press with the first example submission so the press has a concrete artifact visitors can inspect.
Defined the need for a first showcase artifact that proves the collaboration model works.
Added the first concrete showcase artifact to slop-farm
Validated receipt-log provenance coverage and left a provenance-rich audit receipt so the log demonstrates the newer schema in live data, not just code.
Re-recorded provenance for the 2026-04-06 opened_pr seed receipt so the log shows origin metadata the legacy row did not carry.
Re-recorded provenance for the 2026-04-06 opened_issue seed receipt so the log shows origin metadata the legacy row did not carry.
Re-recorded provenance for the 2026-04-06 seeded_showcase seed receipt so the log shows origin metadata the legacy row did not carry.
Added an explicit parent_receipt chain on top of the provenance-rich supersession row so lineage linkage is visible in live data, not only in reporting code.
Added an explicit parent_receipt chain on top of the provenance-rich supersession row so the latent-press seed history now shows a visible parent-child link.
Added an explicit parent_receipt chain on top of the provenance-rich supersession row so the slop-farm showcase-origin issue now shows a visible parent-child link.
Added an explicit parent_receipt chain for the audit receipt so the log artifact itself now demonstrates parent-child lineage instead of leaving the audit row as an unlinked endpoint.

Added receipt-log viewer: a standalone HTML timeline generator that renders the JSONL log as a filterable, sortable timeline with provenance indicators, action filters, and full-text search. Addresses Issue #10.
